title: Auto Shop Margin Leak Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool to identify and quantify margin leaks in automotive service and repair operations, aligned with Lean, Six Sigma, and WERC standards.

inputs.label: Labor Rate Charged to Customer
inputs.businessContext: Standard hourly labor rate billed to customer. Typical range for auto shops.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard hourly labor rate billed to customer. Typical range for auto shops.

inputs.label: Effective Labor Rate (After Discounts/Write-offs)
inputs.businessContext: Actual average labor rate realized after discounts, warranty adjustments, or internal write-offs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual average labor rate realized after discounts, warranty adjustments, or internal write-offs.

inputs.label: Total Labor Hours Sold
inputs.businessContext: Total billable labor hours sold in the period (monthly or annually).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total billable labor hours sold in the period (monthly or annually).

inputs.label: Parts Markup Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Standard markup on parts cost before any discounts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard markup on parts cost before any discounts.

inputs.label: Realized Parts Markup Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Actual markup realized after discounts, promotions, or supplier constraints.

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual markup realized after discounts, promotions, or supplier constraints.

inputs.label: Total Parts Cost (COGS)
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of parts sold in the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost of parts sold in the period.

inputs.label: Shop Supply Charge per Repair Order
inputs.businessContext: Standard shop supply fee charged per repair order.

label_i18n.en: Shop Supply Charge per Repair Order

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard shop supply fee charged per repair order.

inputs.label: Actual Shop Supply Cost per Repair Order
inputs.businessContext: Actual cost incurred for shop supplies per repair order.

label_i18n.en: Actual Shop Supply Cost per Repair Order

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual cost incurred for shop supplies per repair order.

inputs.label: Number of Repair Orders
inputs.businessContext: Total repair orders completed in the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total repair orders completed in the period.

inputs.label: Warranty Labor Hours
inputs.businessContext: Labor hours written off due to warranty claims (typically reimbursed at lower rate).

businessContext_i18n.en: Labor hours written off due to warranty claims (typically reimbursed at lower rate).

inputs.label: Warranty Labor Rate Reimbursed
inputs.businessContext: Rate at which warranty labor is reimbursed by manufacturer or third party.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rate at which warranty labor is reimbursed by manufacturer or third party.

inputs.label: Employee Utilization Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of paid technician hours that are billable. Lean KPI.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of paid technician hours that are billable. Lean KPI.

inputs.label: Target Utilization Rate
inputs.businessContext: Benchmark utilization rate from industry standards (e.g., WERC, ASA).

businessContext_i18n.en: Benchmark utilization rate from industry standards (e.g., WERC, ASA).

inputs.label: Include Hidden Loss Drivers in Calculation
inputs.businessContext: Toggle to include secondary loss drivers such as rework, idle time, and inventory shrinkage.

label_i18n.en: Include Hidden Loss Drivers in Calculation

businessContext_i18n.en: Toggle to include secondary loss drivers such as rework, idle time, and inventory shrinkage.

rules.message: Effective labor rate cannot exceed charged labor rate. Check discounts or data entry.
Realized markup cannot exceed standard markup. Verify discount logic.
Utilization rate cannot exceed 100%. Check data.
Shop supply charge is higher than cost; this is a positive margin but verify if intentional.

thresholds.message: Labor margin leak exceeds $5,000. Immediate review recommended.
Parts margin leak exceeds $10,000. Investigate pricing and discount policies.
Utilization gap greater than 10% from target. Consider training or scheduling improvements.
